metadata.title: Shadaj – Hindustani Classical Music

data.summary: Shadaj Inc. is a non-profit organization focused on promoting music through various events, including the Shadaj Music Festival 2026, which offers early bird and member discounts. Upcoming events feature renowned artists such as Ambarish Das, Abhishek Lahiri, and Pandit Vijay Koparkar, showcasing Hindustani classical vocal and instrumental concerts. The organization encourages membership renewals and participation in music appreciation sessions, providing opportunities for community engagement and support for music education.
